'''navasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatrochemistry|iatrochemistry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-v-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatrochemistry|iatrochemistry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| navasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nævæshæth|nævæshæth]] || [[word:nævæshæj|nævæshæj]] || [[word:nævæshæsh|nævæshæsh]] || [[word:nævæshæ|nævæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:navavashath|navavashath]] || [[word:navavashaj|navavashaj]] || [[word:navavashash|navavashash]] || [[word:navavasha|navavasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:navashath|navashath]] || [[word:navashaj|navashaj]] || [[word:navashash|navashash]] || [[word:navasha|navasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:navafshafth|navafshafth]] || [[word:navafshafj|navafshafj]] || [[word:navafshafsh|navafshafsh]] || [[word:navafshaf|navafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:navashatha|navashatha]] || [[word:navashaja|navashaja]] || [[word:navashasha|navashasha]] || [[word:navashaka|navashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:navashath|navashath]] || [[word:navashaj|navashaj]] || [[word:navashash|navashash]] || [[word:navasha|navasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:navashathal|navashathal]] || [[word:navashajal|navashajal]] || [[word:navashashal|navashashal]] || [[word:navashakal|navashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:navashaathatha|navashaathatha]] || [[word:navashaajaja|navashaajaja]] || [[word:navashaashasha|navashaashasha]] || [[word:navashaaka|navashaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:navashathan|navashathan]] || [[word:navashajan|navashajan]] || [[word:navashashan|navashashan]] || [[word:navashakan|navashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:navashathaoro|navashathaoro]] || [[word:navashajaoro|navashajaoro]] || [[word:navashashaoro|navashashaoro]] || [[word:navashakaoro|navashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
